description_long: This sculpture is a finely detailed bust of a woman, featuring a classical style with a prominent headdress and draped garment. The facial features are delicately rendered, with a serene expression and downcast eyes. The headdress is voluminous and textured, wrapping around the head and extending backward. The bust is mounted on a rectangular plinth, and the garment is adorned with subtle folds and decorative elements at the shoulders. The back of the sculpture reveals the intricate structure of the headdress and the smooth, unfinished surface of the rear torso. A thin support rod is visible at the back, likely for stabilization or display purposes.
description: A classical bust of a woman with a detailed headdress and draped garment, mounted on a rectangular plinth. The sculpture features fine facial details and a visible support rod at the back.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the back of the headdress, the draped garment, and the support rod.
description_view_1: Back view highlighting the full volume of the headdress, the garment's rear folds, and the support rod.
description_view_2: Right-side view displaying the woman's profile, facial features, and the detailed headdress.
description_view_3: Front three-quarter view focusing on the woman's face, headdress, and the draped garment's decorative details.
attribute_subject_matter: bust of a woman in classical attire with a headdress
attribute_location_context: No specific installation context is visible; the background is plain and isolated.
